ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-30-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court finds that notice is appropriate and noted that no objections have been received. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 14, 2004 and the codicil dated March 23, 2010 are admitted to probate. Brian O'Flynn is appointed as the Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 6, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: N. Ng. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Continued To Dec-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
